== Notes for [[Item:Q104436|Q104436]] ==

* Reference: [https://www.ancestry.com/family-tree/person/tree/11972161/person/232033858340 Ancestry Genealogy] - [https://www.geni.com/projects/SmartCopy/18783 SmartCopy]: ''Sep 12 2018, 16:27:29 UTC''

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000016598720508

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
